The key point here is that while typically there will be some production of water during the conversion of ZnO to Zn(OH)₂, this isn't guaranteed without adequate moisture present initially.

Answer: C Your agreement aligns well with the nuances discussed previously about the necessity of initial moisture for producing water as a byproduct. Given these considerations:
